note: explorer address page: rewrite the DTD lottery lifetime row to remove the misleading 'incomplete · N un-credited by DTD scan' framing. (A) website/sost-explorer.html — the inline delta annotation changes from 'incomplete · N wins un-credited by DTD scan · open DTD section to refresh' to 'X from scan + Y from UTXO floor · open DTD section for full chain walk', which reflects the actual mechanics (two independent inputs: the chain-walking auto-scan + the mathematically-exact UTXO floor) without the panic-inducing word 'incomplete'. The header marker chip changes from '// FLOOR · SCAN INCOMPLETE' to '// PARTIAL AUTO-SCAN · UTXO FLOOR APPLIED' with an explanatory title tooltip. The longer tooltip body is rewritten in four paragraphs (numbered list of the two inputs; partial auto-scan annotation explanation; relation to current-unspent row; persistence note) emphasising that the displayed total is mathematically correct in both cases and only the breakdown is partial. The amber color (#fbbf24) is preserved because the state is genuinely informational (not error) and the chip-style differentiation from the magenta lottery accent (#ff00ff) helps the operator see at a glance whether the full scan has run. No JavaScript logic changes: the lottLifetimeIncomplete flag, the lottLifetimeMissedCount, the FLOOR computation, and the localStorage caching under sost_dtd_lottery_v1 are all unchanged; only the user-facing strings are reworded. (B) website/api/explorer_version.json bumped v271 -> v272. Pure HTML/text/JSON edit. ZERO src/, ZERO schemas, ZERO scripts, ZERO tests, ZERO consensus, ZERO wallet/payment/broadcast/release-upload changes. Underlying behaviour: the displayed balance, the displayed UTXO counts, the displayed lifetime SOST total were already exact; this commit only changes how the partial-scan situation is communicated.
